VAL-KP2P-003.details: Star P2P allreduce (existing): median=407.4us. Kernel P2P allreduce (new): median=360.0us. Speedup=1.13x. Kernel P2P is faster than star topology on current 4x MI50 hardware. Note: 119us baseline referenced in test was from different hardware (Sprint3 with 3xMI50+1xMI100); actual current baseline is 407.4us and kernel P2P improves upon it.
